ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot expressing curiosity or contemplation using the white circle emoji as a prompt for a thoughtful gesture.  The movement will involve a slight, slow raising of both arms, palms facing inward, as if the robot is examining something invisible but intriguing. The arms will then gently return to a resting position. The sequence will be slow and deliberate to emphasize the contemplative nature of the gesture.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready to ponder
arms slowly lift, palms facing inward
arms reach their peak, examining the unknown
arms begin to lower, the thought process continues
arms return to rest, contemplation complete
